scenarios.description: child(0) on element whose childNodes are non-empty but contain no Element nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filter loop runs but finds no Elements)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one or more non-Element child nodes only
pseudocode: TEST TC09 child on text-only children
// Arrange an element with text and data children but no Element children
parent.append("<span/>", Parser.htmlParser()); // use append(html) to add a node but override as DataNode or non-Element
